posts.text:
Let's set the record straight, James. Men competing in women's sports is well documented.

Unlike you, I took action and enacted the Save Women's Sports Act.

There will be no men in women’s sports in Texas.

Don’t be fooled, Talarico doesn’t share Texas values.


RNC Research (@RNCResearch)

🚨 UNEARTHED

Texas Democrat U.S. Senate candidate James Talarico calls men in girls’ sports a "far-right conspiracy theory."

Talarico is dangerously radical and will not protect Texas women and girls.

Vid

posts.text:
Today, a court stopped EPIC City’s latest attempt to organize a community.

When we uncovered legal violations by EPIC City, the developers tried to rebrand it as “The Meadow.”

At my direction, @TCEQ investigated & caught them illegally trying to take over a municipal utility district for The Meadow.

Today’s court order stops them in their tracks. 

We will not rest in the mission to stop the spread of radical Islam.

posts.text:
The state of Texas will not observe the Cesar Chavez Day holiday. I am directing all Texas state agency heads to comply. In the upcoming legislative session, I will work with Texas lawmakers to remove Cesar Chavez Day from state law altogether.

Reports of the horrific and widely acknowledged sexual assault allegations against Cesar Chavez rightfully dismantle the myth of this progressive hero and undermine the narrative that elevated Chavez as a figure worthy of official state celebration.

Finally, the feds are cracking down on their H-1 B visa fraud in Dallas.

H-1B visas are issued only by the federal government. 

That said, I was the first Governor to halt any state entity from applying for H1B visa workers.

More to come on this.


The Dallas Express News (@DallasExpress)

posts.text:
Texas is rooting out Chinese communists.

I directed state health agencies and public universities to review and catalog all Chinese-manufactured medical devices connected to our networks.

We banned Chinese-linked tech from state systems. We banned hostile foreign adversaries from buying Texas land. And now we're protecting Texans' medical data too.

Communist China will not infiltrate our hospitals.
